current_commit_message: Add access control, account and database API
Setup the integration with setuptools test commands
throw error if reading version has failed
Use `python setup.py test` to run tests
Read API key from environment if not given in arguments
Fix broken argument handling in Client constructor
Move common test setup code to `test_helper`
Use generator to return results of `job_result`
Ensure endpoint starts with 'https://' if scheme not given

Update doc URL of Scheduling Jobs Using TD Console
Fix typo/misspelled words in docstrings etc. (#104)

Update urlquote function call in create_url

Add test for '/' included case for create_url
Use msgpack.Unpacker.feed() to allow fetching large data from the stream (#118)

Add timeout parameter to BulkImport.perform() method
